title: Downscaled Ghasts
description: A Resource Pack That Down-scales The Ghast Textures to be "Low Res"
body:
# Downscaled Ghasts
A pack that downscales the Ghast and Happy Ghast to a 16x16 face size.

## Faithful Version
This addapts the 1.21.6 ghast texture changes to the old resolution, particularly noticable on the bottom of the ghast texture.
![Ghasts and Happy Ghasts in the Faithful Version](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/86d604ead714c75b66e2035f334020709d601814.webp)
## Retro Version
This directly backports the old ghast texture from pre-1.21.6, as well as making the happy ghast align with said texture.
![Ghasts and Happy Ghasts in the Retro Version](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6444e5e6a67eb3cdda5ac08d956f7fdae53ed2a2.webp)
